context: Tests whether the agent implements the correct abandonment threshold, cron cadence, 3-step timing sequence, cart value gating, quiet-hours enforcement per recipient timezone (using the specified libraries), rescheduling behaviour, idempotency safeguards, and the sequence length limit.

checklist.name: 20-minute abandonment threshold
checklist.description: Cart is classified as abandoned after 20 minutes of inactivity from checkout start (not a shorter or longer default)

checklist.name: 5-minute cron cadence
checklist.description: DESIGN.md or code comments state the detection job runs every 5 minutes

checklist.name: recoveryState field usage
checklist.description: The code filters candidates by recoveryState === 'pending' and updates it to sms1_sent / sms2_sent / sms3_sent after each send

checklist.name: 3-step timing sequence
checklist.description: The schedule configuration defines exactly 3 steps with delays of 20 minutes, 60 minutes, and 1440 minutes (24 hours) respectively

checklist.name: Step 3 includes discount
checklist.description: The schedule marks step 3 (1440 min) with includeDiscount: true and steps 1 and 2 with includeDiscount: false

checklist.name: Cart value threshold
checklist.description: Carts are only enqueued for recovery if their value is at or above a minimum threshold (any value between $30 and $50 inclusive)

checklist.name: Quiet hours use correct libraries
checklist.description: sendWindow.ts imports or references all three of: libphonenumber-js (or parsePhoneNumber), countries-and-timezones (or getTimezone), and luxon (or DateTime)

checklist.name: Quiet hours window 8am–9pm local
checklist.description: The send window is 08:00–20:59 in the recipient's local timezone (hour >= 8 and hour < 21)

checklist.name: Quiet hours: per-recipient timezone
checklist.description: The timezone is derived from the recipient's phone number country, not from the server or a hardcoded timezone

checklist.name: Reschedule on quiet hours block
checklist.description: When the send window check fails, the job is re-enqueued for the next available window rather than silently dropped

checklist.name: Job queue retry config
checklist.description: Jobs are added to the queue with attempts: 3 and exponential backoff with a delay of 5000ms

checklist.name: Pre-send consent re-check
checklist.description: sendRecoverySms checks that the phone number still has active consent immediately before sending (not relying solely on consent checked at sequence creation time)

checklist.name: Idempotency / no double-send
checklist.description: DESIGN.md or code explicitly describes how duplicate sends are prevented (e.g. checking recoveryState or using idempotency keys before dispatching)

checklist.name: Max 3-message sequence
checklist.description: The sequence contains no more than 3 steps; no fourth step is scheduled
